indicators.name: marble countertop
indicators.rationale: Marble is too hard and slippery for yoga practice.

indicators.name: bar stools
indicators.rationale: Bar stools are too high and uncomfortable for yoga practice.

indicators.name: brick wall
indicators.rationale: Brick wall is too rigid and cold for yoga practice.

indicators.name: large windows
indicators.rationale: Large windows allow natural light and views, which can be calming for yoga.

indicators.name: potted plants
indicators.rationale: Potted plants add a touch of nature and can be calming for yoga.

reasoning_summary: The scene is marginally adequate for yoga due to the presence of large windows allowing natural light and views, but the marble countertop, bar stools, and brick wall make it less suitable for yoga practice.
